title: Design System: Purple Stock

display.purpose: Hero headlines and highest-priority acquisition statements.

headline.purpose: Section leads and explanatory page headings.

body.purpose: General UI and benefit copy. Editorial prose may switch to Merriweather.

label.purpose: Buttons, badges, utility nav and compact statuses.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card and surfaced container depth.

shadows.name: action-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for promotional violet actions.

shadows.name: desktop-chrome
shadows.purpose: Top navigation chrome with desktop-bar feel.

motion.name: ease-out-short
motion.purpose: Short dropdown and hover transitions in navigation and UI controls.

motion.name: blob-loop
motion.purpose: Decorative gradient-blob animation used in legacy hero treatments.

rules: Violet means action, not background saturation.
The interface stays mostly light and flat by default.
Editorial serif is for long-form reading only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary conversion action for trial, demo and high-priority navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:8px 16px; border:none; border-radius:6px; background:#8b5cf6; color:#ffffff; font:500 14px/1.2 Poppins, sans-serif; transition:background-color .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#7928ca; box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #8b5cf6; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action for demos and lower-pressure exploration.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:40px; padding:8px 16px; border:1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius:6px; background:#ffffff; color:#7928ca; font:500 14px/1.2 Poppins, sans-serif; transition:background-color .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:#f5f5f5; border-color:#8b5cf6; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standard informational container with light border and restrained depth.
components.html:
Controle em tempo real

Tenha indicadores de estoque sempre atualizados.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#ffffff; color:#0a0a0a; border:1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius:8px; padding:24px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card h3 { margin:0 0 8px; font:600 24px/1.2 Poppins, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin:0; font:400 16px/1.6 Poppins, sans-serif; color:#737373; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Base text field from the shadcn layer, adapted to the Purple Stock light system.
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; height:40px; padding:8px 12px; border:1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius:6px; background:#ffffff; color:#0a0a0a; font:400 16px/1.6 Poppins, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#737373; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #8b5cf6; }

components.name: Desktop Chrome Nav
components.description: Compact top chrome inspired by desktop operating systems, used as a distinctive landing motif.
components.html:
Purple Stock
RecursosSetoresBlog
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; min-height:25px; padding:0 12px; background:linear-gradient(to bottom, #3d3d3d, #2a2a2a); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9); box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1); font:500 13px/1.2 Poppins, sans-serif; } .ds-nav nav { display:flex; gap:4px; } .ds-nav a, .ds-nav-brand { padding:2px 12px; border-radius:3px; color:inherit; text-decoration:none; } .ds-nav a:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

dos: Use white and very light neutrals as the dominant floor.
Keep purple attached to calls to action, active states and brand recall.
Use editorial blue and serif only in long-form explanatory content.
donts: Do not turn the landing into generic SaaS marketing with flashy gradients, vague promises or decorative metrics.
Do not inherit fintech, AI-startup or neon-dashboard aesthetics.
Do not make the interface bureaucratic, enterprise-heavy or visually cold.
Do not use purple as all-over background saturation.
Do not default to glassmorphism or repetitive identical card grids.
